title: hplip bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[3.23.12-10]
- RHEL-102977 rpm -q --changelog hplip no longer lists changelog

[3.23.12-9]
- enable following links with curl in all use cases
  Resolves: RHEL-84817
- hp-plugin-download wrongly parsed file type
  Resolves: RHEL-97437
full_text:
[3.23.12-10]
- RHEL-102977 rpm -q --changelog hplip no longer lists changelog

[3.23.12-9]
- enable following links with curl in all use cases
  Resolves: RHEL-84817
- hp-plugin-download wrongly parsed file type
  Resolves: RHEL-97437

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-20426-0.html
